name: Dried Beef'n Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 package of frozen peas, 10 oz, or
1 package of grated sharp process cheese, 8 oz
recipeInstructions:
1. Snip dried beef into small pieces and set aside.
2. Cook noodles according to package directions until barely tender.
3. In a large bowl, toss the cooked noodles with oil; set aside.
4. In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat.
5. Blend in flour until smooth.
6. Gradually stir in evaporated milk. Continue cooking until smooth and thick.
7. Pour the white sauce over the noodles; toss to mix.
8. Fold in the snipped beef, vegetables, and most of the grated cheese, reserving a small amount to sprinkle on top.
9. Stir well.
10. Pour the mixture into a well-greased Crock-Pot.
11. Sprinkle lightly with the reserved cheese.
12. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 10 hours.
Serves 4 to 6
